## Cloudflare and DigitalOcean flagged in weekly big-movers roundup alongside Lazard, Sonos, and Carnival

NET and DOCN appearing in a big-movers list without named catalysts is a flag to investigate whether any fundamental development is driving the moves; for a portfolio with enterprise-cloud exposure, unexplained price dislocations in these names warrant follow-up.

- A weekly big-movers summary named NET and DOCN among notable price movers.
- No direction of move, catalyst, or magnitude is specified in the headline.
- The mixed-sector grouping (tech, financials, consumer) indicates a broad market-movers screen rather than a thematic catalyst.
